Hero.title: Trusted Accounting & Tax Consulting Services
Hero.subtitle: Ilias P. Viliotis — Financial Consultant with years of experience in accounting, tax, and labor management.

About.label: About us
About.title: The Consultant You Trust
About.description: Based in Melissia, Attica, the accounting office of Viliotis Ilias provides comprehensive accounting, tax, and labor services to individuals and businesses. A graduate of the University of Piraeus (A.B.S.P.), Ilias Viliotis combines academic expertise with practical experience to deliver specialized solutions.
About.card1Desc: Years of experience in accounting and tax matters
About.card2Desc: Consistency and responsibility in every transaction
About.card3Desc: Graduate of A.B.S.P. — University of Piraeus

Services.label: Services
Services.title: What We Offer
Services.subtitle: Comprehensive solutions for every accounting, tax, and labor need.
Services.accountingDesc: Bookkeeping (single & double entry), balance sheets, VAT, periodic declarations, and financial statements.
Services.taxDesc: Tax returns (E1, E2, E9), property tax (ENFIA), tax planning, audit support, and appeals.
Services.payrollDesc: Payroll processing, social security declarations, employment contracts, hiring/termination, ERGANI, and labor disputes.

Contact.label: Contact
Contact.title: Get in Touch
Contact.subtitle: We are available for any questions or appointments.

Footer.description: Accounting & Tax office in Melissia. Trusted services for individuals and businesses.
